creator: hdholm@alumni.iastate.edu
text: It is in upstream, but there's no one but me to blame for that.  The short answer is that I don't remember why that's there, but for sure I know haven't tested it in a jail environment.  If it's working for you in a jail with the keyword removed, I'm happy to remove the nojail keyword and push that upstream as well.  (Upstream doesn't do a new build very often though.)
